shortcuts_overview.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts_overview.content:
Pipeflow is designed for quick keyboard access. Learn these shortcuts and you'll fly through your audio routing!

Most shortcuts are single keys - no modifier needed. This keeps things fast and accessible.
shortcuts_overview.tip: Press H anytime to see the full shortcut reference.

panel_shortcuts.title: Panel Shortcuts
panel_shortcuts.content:
Toggle panels on and off:

• H - Help panel (this one!)
• I - Inspector (node details)
• F - Filters panel
• G - Groups panel
• S - Snapshots panel

Panels appear on the sides so they don't cover your graph.
panel_shortcuts.tip: Press the same key again to close a panel.

view_shortcuts.title: View Shortcuts
view_shortcuts.content:
Navigate and zoom:

• +/= - Zoom in
• - - Zoom out
• Ctrl+0 - Reset view (fit all)
• Ctrl+Shift+R - Smart reorganize
view_shortcuts.tip: Mouse scroll wheel also zooms in and out!

safety_shortcuts.title: Safety Shortcuts
safety_shortcuts.content:
Stay safe:

• Space or F9 - PANIC! Mute everything
• Ctrl+L - Toggle routing lock

The panic shortcut is designed to be easy to hit in an emergency!
safety_shortcuts.tip: Space is the biggest key on your keyboard - easy to find when your ears are hurting!

selection_shortcuts.title: Selection Shortcuts
selection_shortcuts.content:
Select nodes efficiently:

• Ctrl+A - Select all visible nodes
• Escape - Deselect all
• Delete - Remove selected links

Combine with mouse:
• Shift+Click - Add to selection
• Ctrl+Click - Toggle selection
selection_shortcuts.tip: Box select by clicking and dragging on empty space.

command_palette.title: Command Palette
command_palette.content:
The ultimate power tool:

• Ctrl+K or Ctrl+P - Open command palette

Type to fuzzy-search through all commands. Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to execute.

Every action in Pipeflow is available here!
command_palette.tip: Forgot a shortcut? Open the command palette and search for what you want to do.
